subject: Built a quick website concept for Seaway Cleaning
body:
Hi,

I came across Seaway Cleaning Services while looking at cleaning companies in Cornwall. I'm a local web designer, and I liked what you're doing with the eco-friendly approach, so I put together a quick one-page website preview as a concept for you.

No strings attached. I just wanted to show what a simple, clean site could look like for a local business like yours.

Should I send the link?

Thanks,
[Your name]
